# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.

Prevent istio jwt validation weak.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-authentication
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "https://auth.example.com"
    jwksUri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    audiences:
    - "api.example.com"
    - "https://api.example.com"
    forwardOriginalToken: false
    fromHeaders:
    - name: Authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    fromParams:
    - "access_token"
    outputPayloadToHeader: "x-jwt-payload"
    outputClaimToHeaders:
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-sub"
      claim: "sub"
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-email"
      claim: "email"
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-roles"
      claim: "roles"
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-scope"
      claim: "scope"
    timeout: "5s"
  - issuer: "https://auth-backup.example.com"
    jwksUri: "https://auth-backup.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    audiences:
    - "api.example.com"
    forwardOriginalToken: false
    fromHeaders:
    - name: Authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    timeout: "5s"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: require-jwt
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        notRequestPrincipals: ["*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        paths:
        - "/api/*"
        - "/v1/*"
        methods:
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
        - "PUT"
        - "DELETE"
        - "PATCH"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: jwt-claims-validation
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["https://auth.example.com/*"]
    when:
    - key: request.auth.claims[iss]
      values: ["https://auth.example.com"]
    - key: request.auth.claims[aud]
      values: ["api.example.com", "https://api.example.com"]
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["https://auth-backup.example.com/*"]
    when:
    - key: request.auth.claims[iss]
      values: ["https://auth-backup.example.com"]
    - key: request.auth.claims[aud]
      values: ["api.example.com"]
  - to:
    - operation:
        paths:
        - "/health"
        - "/metrics"
        - "/ready"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-peer-authentication
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
